title: dianthus strictus subsp. strictus
intro: Dianthus strictus subsp. strictus, also known as the Himalayan pink or Chinese pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dianthus strictus subsp. strictus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
